subcodes.first_line: The mention of the One True Friend is, in truth, the breath of life unto the bodies of the world and a fountain of life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر دوست یکتا فی الحقیقه نفحه حیاتست از برای اجساد عالم و چشمه زندگانیست از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @scarcity of receptive souls
